q: Do you think computers/Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư will replace teachers in the future?
examiner_note:
Đây là câu hỏi về dự đoán (Prediction). 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn có thể chọn 'không hoàn toàn'. Giải thích rằng Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư có thể hỗ trợ chấm điểm hay cung cấp thông tin, nhưng không thể thay thế sự thấu cảm, truyền cảm hứng và kỹ năng sư phạm của con người. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'complement rather than replace', 'lack the human touch', 'empathy and moral guidance', 'automated grading', 'personalized learning paths'.

band7.text: I don't think computers will completely replace teachers. Even though Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư can help us learn faster and provide a lot of information, it can't understand our feelings or encourage us when we are failing. Teachers are important because they can inspire students, which a machine cannot do.
band7.note: Trả lời rõ ràng, đưa ra quan điểm trung lập và giải thích lý do về mặt cảm xúc. Ngữ pháp ổn định.

band8.text: In my opinion, Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư will complement rather than replace teachers. While machines are incredibly efficient at data processing and automated grading, they lack the 'human touch' which is essential for fostering a positive learning environment and providing moral guidance to young learners.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao ('complement', 'automated grading', 'human touch', 'fostering', 'moral guidance'). Cấu trúc câu linh hoạt.

band9.text: I firmly believe that the human element is irreplaceable in education. Although Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư can facilitate highly personalized learning paths and offer instant feedback, it cannot replicate the complex emotional intelligence and empathy that a teacher brings to the classroom. Teachers serve as role models, and that mentorship belongs uniquely to humans.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở trình độ rất cao ('human element', 'irreplaceable', 'facilitate', 'personalized learning paths', 'replicate', 'emotional intelligence', 'mentorship'). Lập luận cực kỳ sâu sắc và thuyết phục.

v.example: The new software is designed to complement the existing system.

v.meaning: sự tương tác/quan tâm của con người
v.example: In the world of automated customer service, many people still value the human touch.
His contribution to the research team was absolutely irreplaceable.
The new app is designed to facilitate communication between teachers and parents.

v.meaning: lộ trình học tập cá nhân hóa
v.example: Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư can analyze student performance to create a personalized learning path for everyone.
It's difficult for a machine to replicate the complex nuances of human speech.
High emotional intelligence is key to being an effective leader and teacher.
The university provides a mentorship program for first-year students.
Automated grading can save teachers a lot of time on multiple-choice tests.
Parents and teachers play a vital role in providing moral guidance to children.
Showing empathy towards your students helps build a strong relationship.
The teacher's passion for science inspired many of her students to become researchers.
I firmly believe that everyone deserves an equal opportunity to succeed.
Education will always require the human element to be truly effective.
Online quizzes provide students with instant feedback on their performance.
The teacher acted as a facilitator during the group discussion.
The goal of the course is to develop students' critical thinking skills.
Maths and Science subjects help improve logical problem-solving abilities.
Adaptive learning software changes its content based on the user's progress.
We are living in a digital era where technology is changing every aspect of our lives.

v.word: artificial intelligence (Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư)
v.example: Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư is being used to automate many tasks in various industries.
Machine learning algorithms can identify patterns in large datasets.
The ethics of Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư is a growing field of study.
Computers are incredibly efficient at large-scale data processing.
Creativity is a uniquely human quality that machines struggle to replicate.
A good translator needs to understand the subtle nuances of language.
Humans are much better than computers at dealing with ambiguity and context.

v.meaning: kỹ năng liên nhân (giữa người với người)
v.example: Teaching requires strong interpersonal skills and empathy.
A growth mentality is essential for continuous improvement.
A few words of encouragement can make a big difference to a student.
Teachers play a key role in maintaining student motivation.
Collaborative learning encourages students to work together towards a common goal.
In the fast-changing digital era, lifelong learning is more important than ever.
The school uses a variety of pedagogical methods to engage students.
Technological innovation is driving changes in education.
VR can be used to create immersive learning experiences for students.
AR can bring textbook illustrations to life in 3D.
Distance learning has become increasingly popular over the last few years.
The university uses an online platform for submitting assignments and viewing grades.
Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư is very efficient at knowledge delivery, but teachers are better at mentorship.
A well-rounded education includes both academic and emotional development.

v.meaning: học tập cảm xúc xã hội
v.example: Social-emotional learning is an essential part of the modern curriculum.
The goal of education is to prepare students to be responsible global citizens.
Adaptability is a vital skill in the 21-century job market.

v.meaning: bền vững/không bị lạc hậu trong tương lai
v.example: The school aims to future-proof its students by teaching them advanced tech skills.
The project takes an interdisciplinary approach, combining history and data science.
Writing essays helps to develop strong analytical skills.

v.meaning: khả năng tự điều chỉnh/kỷ luật
v.example: Self-regulation is an important skill for students who study independently.
The lecture on the ethics of Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư was very thought-provoking.
Learning about different cultures was an eye-opening experience for me.
